channel.title: 4minit - Mauritius News in 4 Minutes
channel.description: A free daily newsletter covering Mauritius news, regional developments, and the global headlines that matter — in your inbox every morning.

item.title: 'Every day felt like prison': the testimonies breaking from Twaha Academy
item.description: Today's 4minit: Government prepares water rationing plan as drought enters critical phase. Pan-African activist Kemi Seba faces extradition from South Africa to Benin. Trump extends Iran ceasefire but leaves Hormuz blockade in place.. Read more.

item.title: The man who built the MMM for 55 years just walked out of it
item.description: Today's 4minit: "La situation est critique": water reservoirs hit historic lows. Macky Sall, Africa's sole candidate, bids for UN Secretary General. Tim Cook hands Apple to his head of hardware.. Read more.

item.title: Three charges, no bail: Mufti Peerbocus faces court
item.description: Today's 4minit: Ten dead women, no official count: Mauritius announces domestic violence overhaul. DRC and M23 agree to protect civilians, free prisoners within 10 days. US seizes Iranian ship in Hormuz, Tehran calls it piracy and vows to respond.. Read more.
